ast.name: log
ast.source: Scanning local vault for untracked or modified files...
ast.target: 正在扫描本地保险库以查找未跟踪或已修改的文件...

ast.target: 正在加载 Supabase Vault Sync 插件...

ast.target: 正在卸载 Supabase Vault Sync 插件...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose an existing vault or create a new one.
ast.target: 选择一个现有保险库或创建一个新保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max 10 characters: letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores.
ast.target: 最多 10 个字符：字母、数字、连字符、下划线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A friendly name to identify this device in sync history.
ast.target: 一个友好名称，用于在同步历史中标识此设备。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The API endpoint for your Supabase project (e.g. https://xxxx.supabase.co).
ast.target: 您的 Supabase 项目的 API 端点（例如 https://xxxx.supabase.co）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Supabase Anon Key (or Service Role Key) for database/storage operations.
ast.target: 您的 Supabase 匿名密钥（或服务角色密钥），用于数据库/存储操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Validate that the Supabase settings and API credentials are correct.
ast.target: 验证 Supabase 设置和 API 凭据是否正确。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your Supabase auth account email.
ast.target: 输入您的 Supabase 认证账户邮箱。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your Supabase auth account password.
ast.target: 输入您的 Supabase 认证账户密码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log in to secure database & storage access.
ast.target: 登录以安全访问数据库和存储。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault setup is incomplete. Configure your vault ID and device name to start syncing.
ast.target: 保险库设置不完整。请配置您的保险库 ID 和设备名称以开始同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Trigger synchronization automatically when notes are created, modified, or deleted locally.
ast.target: 在本地创建、修改或删除笔记时自动触发同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in seconds to wait after a change before triggering auto-sync (debounced). Min: 1.
ast.target: 在更改后等待触发自动同步的延迟秒数（防抖）。最小值：1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval in seconds to automatically sync your vault. Set to 0 to disable interval-based sync.
ast.target: 自动同步保险库的间隔秒数。设置为 0 可禁用基于间隔的同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually execute a full bi-directional synchronization with your Supabase database and storage.
ast.target: 手动执行与 Supabase 数据库和存储的完整双向同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clear all local sync metadata and the pending queue. The next sync will perform a full re-scan and safely merge local and remote files by hash. No files will be deleted.
ast.target: 清除所有本地同步元数据和待处理队列。下次同步将执行完整重新扫描，并通过哈希值安全合并本地和远程文件。不会删除任何文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View active vaults in the database, view connected devices, notes, binary files, and manage vault deletion.
ast.target: 查看数据库中的活动保险库、已连接设备、笔记、二进制文件，并管理保险库删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Age in days after which soft-deleted files are automatically purged from database and storage during sync.
ast.target: 软删除文件在同步期间自动从数据库和存储中清除的天数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually hard-delete (permanently remove) files in Supabase that have been soft-deleted for longer than this duration, or remove all.
ast.target: 手动硬删除（永久移除）在 Supabase 中软删除时间超过此持续时间的文件，或移除所有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include soft-deleted files (where deleted_at is set) in the SQL database backup.
ast.target: 在 SQL 数据库备份中包含软删除文件（其中 deleted_at 已设置）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export your Supabase vault database tables matching the current vault name into a local .sql file.
ast.target: 将与当前保险库名称匹配的 Supabase 保险库数据库表导出到本地 .sql 文件。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 正在从 Supabase 数据库加载保险库...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Realtime send() is automatically falling back to REST API. This behavior will be deprecated in the future. Please use httpSend() explicitly for REST delivery.
ast.target: 实时发送() 正在自动回退到 REST API。此行为将在未来弃用。请显式使用 httpSend() 进行 REST 交付。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WebCrypto API is not supported. Code challenge method will default to use plain instead of sha256.
ast.target: WebCrypto API 不受支持。代码质询方法将默认使用 plain 而非 sha256。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued over 120s ago, URL could be stale
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 检索的会话签发于 120 秒前，URL 可能已过期

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued in the future? Check the device clock for skew
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 检索的会话签发于未来？请检查设备时钟是否有偏差

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to set initial Realtime auth token:
ast.target: 设置初始实时身份验证令牌失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️  Node.js 18 and below are deprecated and will no longer be supported in future versions of @supabase/supabase-js. Please upgrade to Node.js 20 or later. For more information, visit: https://github.com/orgs/supabase/discussions/37217
ast.target: ⚠️  Node.js 18 及以下版本已弃用，未来版本的 @supabase/supabase-js 将不再支持。请升级到 Node.js 20 或更高版本。更多信息，请访问：https://github.com/orgs/supabase/discussions/37217

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: Supabase connection settings are incomplete.
ast.target: 错误：Supabase 连接设置不完整。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: You must log in to your Supabase account to start synchronization.
ast.target: 错误：您必须登录 Supabase 账户才能开始同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: Vault ID is required to start synchronization. Please enter a Vault ID in settings.
ast.target: 错误：开始同步需要保险库 ID。请在设置中输入保险库 ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sync failed: Check Supabase settings or network connection.
ast.target: 同步失败：请检查 Supabase 设置或网络连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: First sync to this Supabase project. Safely initializing...
ast.target: 首次同步到此 Supabase 项目。正在安全初始化...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No remote files found. Re-initializing vault upload to protect local files...
ast.target: 未找到远程文件。正在重新初始化保险库上传以保护本地文件...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 保险库设置完成！开始同步…

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 错误：测试前必须配置 Supabase URL 和 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Connection test successful! Both Database and Storage are fully accessible.
ast.target: 连接测试成功！数据库和存储均可完全访问。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sync state reset. Next sync will re-scan and safely merge all files.
ast.target: 同步状态已重置。下次同步将重新扫描并安全合并所有文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: Supabase connection and active login are required.
ast.target: 错误：需要 Supabase 连接和活动登录。

ast.target: 错误：需要 Supabase 连接、活动登录和保险库 ID。

ast.target: 没有符合标准的软删除文件。

ast.target: 在 Supabase 中未找到此保险库 ID 的数据库记录。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 导出数据库失败：查询错误。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 同步元数据已重置！下次同步将扫描并上传/更新所有文件。

ast.target: 检测到 Cloudflare Workers。Cloudflare Workers 不支持 WebSocket 客户端。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unknown JavaScript runtime without WebSocket support.
ast.target: 未知的 JavaScript 运行时不支持 WebSocket。
